title: BetterGame
body:
## Description
Bettergame is a mod that adds multiple blocks and items to the game that should already be in the game.

This mod will be updated as more features are added.

## Features
Bettergame adds some new blocks and items to the game like concrete slabs, terracotta shingles, copper buttons...

### Screenshot
![Concrete slabs and stairs](https://i.imgur.com/2s3XzNr.png)
![Copper buttons](https://i.imgur.com/by6anZt.png)
![Terracotta shingles](https://i.imgur.com/XGOuFIY.png)
